2026May 4, 2026

Virtual

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Virtual, May 4, 2026 -- May 15, 2026

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2026-05-virtual

20 Resolutions

1195Plenary
Advance ISO/PWI 13584-26 ed2 to stage 20

1193Plenary

1192Plenary
Confirm retention of ISO/TS 10303-17:2022 after systematic review

1187Plenary
Move ISO/AWI 10303-62 ed5 directly to DIS ballot, skip CD ballot
SC4 resolves to skip the CD ballot (stage 30.0) and move directly to a DIS ballot (stage 40.0), with the DIS ballot to be initiated no later than 2026-07-31
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1186Plenary
Move ISO/AWI 10303-59 ed5 directly to DIS ballot, skip CD ballot
SC4 resolves to skip the CD ballot (stage 30.0) and move directly to a DIS ballot (stage 40.0), with the DIS ballot to be initiated no later than 2026-07-31.

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
